name: perf budget: total ms across all files surfaced as run.totals.ms in JSON report
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rule-engine/cli.sh" --rule no-eval --in "$PWD/src/**/*.js" --report-format json 2>out.json && grep -E '"totals":\{[^}]*"ms":[0-9]+' out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup: mkdir -p src && for i in 1 2 3; do echo 'eval(x)' > src/f${i}.js; done
